elements.title: You are walking down the road towards Gramps house, and you finally see the house appear around the bend of the road.
elements.value: You are walking down the road towards Gramps house, and you finally see the house appear around the bend of the road. Yay!
elements.html: You are walking down the road towards Gramps house, and you finally see the house appear around the bend of the road. Yay!

elements.title: You approach the front porch and try knocking on the door. No answer. To the right of the door is a wooden cane.
elements.value: You approach the front porch. It's a little dusty up here, but looks nice. There's a couple of rocking chairs. WOO HOO!
elements.html: You approach the front porch. It's a little dusty up here, but looks nice. There's a couple of rocking chairs. WOO HOO!

elements.title: To the right of the door is a wooden cane.
elements.value: Propped up against one of the chairs is a wooden cane.
elements.html: Propped up against one of the chairs is a wooden cane.

elements.title: You're walking down the road towards Gramps house, and you finally arrive. You're facing the front of the house by the road. There is a front porch entrance and to the side, there's a gate to the rear of the house.
elements.value: You are facing the front of Gramp's house by the road. There is a front porch entrance and to the side, there is a gate to the rear of the house.
elements.html: You are facing the front of Gramp's house by the road. There is a front porch entrance and to the side, there is a gate to the rear of the house.

elements.title: You take the side gate and walk behind the house. Gramps is there.
elements.value: You take the side gate and walk behind the house. Gramps is there.
elements.html: You take the side gate and walk behind the house. Gramps is there.

elements.title: Would you mind going back to the front of the house and bringing me my cane?
elements.value: 'Hey there, my boy,' he says, 'Good to see ya! Would you mind going back to the front of the house and bringing me my cane?'
elements.html: 'Hey there, my boy,' he says, 'Good to see ya! Would you mind going back to the front of the house and bringing me my cane?'

elements.title: "Ah, there's my cane! Thanks for grabbing it for me!"
elements.value: "Ah, you've got my cane! Thanks for grabbing it for me!"
elements.html: "Ah, you've got my cane! Thanks for grabbing it for me!"

elements.value: Back to the Front of The House||f798bffa-34a8-4e5c-8a6b-155a30f505a0

elements.title: You got the cane! It seems nice and sturdy!
elements.value: You got the cane! It seems nice and sturdy!
elements.html: You got the cane! It seems nice and sturdy!

elements.title: That was the end of the experiment with Gramps. The event for the wooden stick will reset if you start over at the first page.

elements.title: You are walking in the woods. There's a fork in the path. Which path do you take?
elements.value: You are walking in the woods. There's a fork in the path. Which path do you take?
elements.html: You are walking in the woods. There's a fork in the path. Which path do you take?

elements.title: You continue to walk and you see a clearing. A big waterfall is right in front of you! Also, behind the waterfall appears to be a cave.
elements.value: You continue to walk and you see a clearing. A big waterfall is right in front of you! Also, behind the waterfall appears to be a cave.
elements.html: You continue to walk and you see a clearing. A big waterfall is right in front of you! Also, behind the waterfall appears to be a cave.

elements.title:
You keep walking into the forest from the right path and come across a tree that is covered in shiny, golden apples. Sparkles pop up from the fruit! You realize you are very hungry. But then you notice a sign positioned at the base of the tree, with a single word displayed in angrily painted lettering. 
DONT.
elements.value:

But then you notice a sign positioned at the base of the tree, with a single word displayed in angrily painted lettering.

But then you notice a sign positioned at the base of the tree, with a single word displayed in angrily painted lettering. DONT.

elements.title: The water feels good, but the current is strong...you're starting to lose control as you drift further down the stream. You see a branch hanging over from the left, but there's also a flat rock you might be able to swim to on the right.
elements.value: The water at the base of the falls feels good, but the current is strong...you are starting to lose control as you drift further down the stream! You see a branch hanging over from the left, but there's also a flat rock you might be able to swim to on the right.
elements.html: The water at the base of the falls feels good, but the current is strong...you are starting to lose control as you drift further down the stream! You see a branch hanging over from the left, but there's also a flat rock you might be able to swim to on the right.

elements.title: The cave is dark, but there's still enough light to see the way. As you turn a corner, you see a golden light coming from up ahead. You also hear a voice? Growling? Not sure.
elements.value: The cave is dark, but there's still enough light to see the way. As you turn a corner, you see a golden light coming from up ahead. You also hear a voice? Growling? Not sure.
elements.html: The cave is dark, but there's still enough light to see the way. As you turn a corner, you see a golden light coming from up ahead. You also hear a voice? Growling? Not sure.

elements.title: Nevermind, leave the cave and take a swim||138b251b-3241-4f09-9d4b-b32b52694538
elements.value: Nevermind, leave the cave and take a swim||138b251b-3241-4f09-9d4b-b32b52694538
elements.html: Nevermind, leave the cave and take a swim

elements.title:
You look around and listen closely. You don't detect any hostile presence, human or creature. One apple missing won't harm anyone. You reach up and pluck an apple from the tree.

Immediately, there is a loud howl of pain and anger. "WHO DID THAT!??" The tree shakes and starts waving it's branches like arms. It starts to pull its roots from the ground and wiggle them like feet. The tree does not appear to see you....yet.

elements.title: Return the apple and say sorry||68b03e1a-13a4-48ab-9725-8fb473959f7b
elements.html: Return the apple and say sorry

elements.title: Return the apple and say sorry
elements.value: Return the apple and say sorry

elements.title: You put the apple on the ground as the tree turns around, revealing a very angry face that glares at you. It glares glares at the golden apple on the ground, like someone who has just had their hair pulled out.
elements.value:
You put the apple on the ground as the tree turns around, revealing a very angry face that glares at you. It glares glares at the golden apple on the ground, like someone who has just had their hair pulled out.
"Can you not read the FREAKING SIGN?!?"
